rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>A waterfall! A waterfall descended from
the sky!
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 48]>Link, what happened? Is this your doing?

<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Aha!<unk[5:0]> So you activated a mysterious device
in the ruins...

rows.JPja: そして <Ruby={2:4}たき>滝が<Ruby={2:6}あらわ>現れた…

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 49]>Hm...<unk[5:1]> Ah! I believe I understand!


To a Zora, a waterfall is no different from
a path.

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>That must be the meaning behind
"watery bridge." Yes, it must!

rows.CNzh: <unk[3:0:257]>只要攀上这个瀑布，就能抵达天空！
rows.TWzh: <unk[3:0:257]>只要沿著瀑布溯流而上，就能抵達天空！
rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:257]>この<Ruby={2:4}たき>滝を<Ruby={2:4}のぼ>登れば <Ruby={2:4}そら>空に<Ruby={2:2}あ>上がれる！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]>If we climb this waterfall, we shall ascend
into the sky!

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:24 67 111 110 118 105 110 99 101 100 95 48 48]>Link! I knew you could do it! My belief in
you is as well placed as ever.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:261]>有人在呼唤我？
到底是什么东西……？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:261]>有人在呼喚我？
這到底是怎麼回事……？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:261]><Ruby={2:4}だれ>誰かが オレを<Ruby={2:2}よ>呼んでいる？
いったい<Ruby={2:4}なん>何だったんだ…？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:261]>Is someone calling to me? What was that
sound I just heard...

<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>Well... In any case, we now have a
path forward. All that is left is to press
ever onward!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:32 68 101 116 101 114 109 105 110 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 48]>その<Color=red>ゾーラの<Ruby={2:6}よろい>鎧<Color=white>なら キミも<Ruby={2:4}たき>滝を<Ruby={2:4}のぼ>登れるゾ！
<Ruby={2:2}い>行こう リンク！！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:32 68 101 116 101 114 109 105 110 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 48]>With your <Color=red>Zora armor<Color=white>, you can climb the
waterfall as well! Let us be off to our next
adventure, Link!

rows.JPja:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:32 68 101 116 101 114 109 105 110 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 48]>ゾーラの<Ruby={2:6}よろい>鎧<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}き>着れば キミも<Ruby={2:4}たき>滝を<Ruby={2:4}のぼ>登れるゾ！
<Ruby={2:2}い>行こう リンク！！
rows.USen:
<Color=red><unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:32 68 101 116 101 114 109 105 110 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 48]><Color=white>If you wear your <Color=red>Zora armor<Color=white>, you can
climb the waterfall as well! Let us be
off to our next adventure, Link!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:32 68 101 116 101 114 109 105 110 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 48]>林克！
只要穿上<Color=red>卓拉铠甲<Color=white>，你也能攀瀑而上卓！
铠甲就去米法公园
找优娜拿好了！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:32 68 101 116 101 114 109 105 110 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 48]>林克！
只要穿上<Color=red>卓拉鎧甲<Color=white>，你也能沿著瀑布溯流而上卓！
東西就在米法公園裡，
快去那裡找優娜拿鎧甲吧！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:32 68 101 116 101 114 109 105 110 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 48]>リンク！
<Color=red>ゾーラの<Ruby={2:6}よろい>鎧<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}き>着れば キミも<Ruby={2:4}たき>滝を<Ruby={2:4}のぼ>登れるゾ！
<Ruby={2:6}よろい>鎧は ミファー<Ruby={4:8}こうえん>公園にいる
ヨナから<Ruby={2:2}う>受け<Ruby={2:2}と>取ってくれ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:32 68 101 116 101 114 109 105 110 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 48]>Link! If you wear the <Color=red>Zora armor<Color=white>, you can
climb the waterfall as well!

You must acquire said armor from Yona
at Mipha Court!
